---
title: "Articles and interviews"
subtitle: |
  Opinion, insight and research about civil service reform practices

listing:
  id: "content-listing"
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort:
    - "date desc"
    - "title desc"
  date-format: "DD-MMM-yyyy"
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  grid-item-border: false

format:
  html:
    toc: true

execute: 
  echo: false
---

Page/article content goes here.

:::{#content-listing}
:::
